content.text: I'll read each frame and judge against the rubric.

[
{"ruleId":"V1","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Each frame centers on the single amber probe arrow and the lilac score bars responding to it, with the periwinkle candidates as supporting context.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V2","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The elements form one coherent system: one probe, four candidate arrows, and four score bars, well under the flood threshold.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V3","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Labels A/B/C/D sit on their arrows, 'probe' rides the amber arrow, and numeric readouts sit on their bars with no legend box.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V4","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"On-screen text is limited to the 'Predict' prompt card and short object labels/readouts, each tied to a visible referent.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V5","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All labels, numeric readouts, and the prediction card text are rendered at readable size against the dark sky.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V6","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All arrows, bars, and the prediction card sit fully inside the frame with adequate margins.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V7","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"When the probe aligns near candidate D the amber arrow slightly overlaps the 'D' label, but no unrelated content is rendered illegible.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V8","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Probe is amber (attention), candidate direction arrows are periwinkle, and score bars are lilac (parameter/score), consistent across frames.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V9","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Every element—probe, candidates, bars, readouts, prediction card—carries propositional content with no decoration.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V10","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The prediction card precedes the sweep, the amber probe rotates through directions, and lilac bars climb with integer readouts (3/5/4/0, 4/1/-2/-5) as promised.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V11","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Score bars sit directly beneath their candidate arrows and readouts sit on the bars, keeping related items together.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V12","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Across frames the probe angle and bar heights change continuously, reading as a sweep rather than cuts.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V13","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The composition keeps generous margins with the arrow cluster above and the bar chart below in a clear reading order.","suggestion":""}
]
